§6Tungsten Reacher§f

§aAn essential safety accessory for handling radioactive and pyrophoric materials!§f

§bThe Tungsten Reacher§f is an accessory that reduces radiation dose from handled materials by the §esquare root§f of the original value. Simply keep it in your inventory for its effects to apply.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• 3×§f Tungsten Bolts
§b• 1×§f Tungsten Ingot
§b• 2×§f Rubber Bar
§b→ §eTungsten Reacher§f

§6Key Benefits§f:
§b• Radioactive Materials§f — reduces radiation dose by sqrt(original value)
§b• Pyrophoric Materials§f — prevents self-immolation when handling fire-prone items

§eTip§f: This is §eessential§f for handling high-radiation items like schrabidium, antimatter, and spent nuclear fuel. Always keep one in your inventory when working with end-game materials! It does not need to be equipped — just in your inventory is enough.
